tooltip.cbc_going_ballistic.safe_charge_: Safe Charge Limit: up to %s powder charges
block.createbigcannons.mortar_stone.tool: Going Ballistic uses a charge-equivalent limit for this projectile instead of CBC's legacy muzzle-speed limit.

Powerful stone that _explodes on impact._ _Flies further_ than other projectiles.
Good for attacking _walls and fortifications._ _Cannot be fuzed and detonated._ Will _break_ if fired with too much propellant.
